danger_signals.visual_form: Animated hostile sprites in level environment
danger_signals.meaning: Direct threat to player progression; collision causes damage

danger_signals.visual_form: Visual obstacles and obstructions placed in level geometry
danger_signals.meaning: Terrain-based damage; requires platforming skill to avoid

danger_signals.visual_form: Devan Shell (primary antagonist) and demon forms in boss arenas
danger_signals.meaning: Climactic danger point; requires specific strategy to defeat

danger_signals.visual_form: Visual metamorphosis of Devan Shell into demonic form
danger_signals.meaning: Escalated threat level; narrative and mechanical danger increase

danger_signals.visual_form: UI display of remaining lives and health meter

safety_signals.visual_form: Collectible sprites (carrots, food items, invincibility symbols)
safety_signals.meaning: Health recovery and temporary invulnerability via 'sugar rush'
Increased player resilience; death penalty mitigation

safety_signals.visual_form: Ammo types (flamethrower, freeze ray, explosives, rapid-fire)
safety_signals.meaning: Enhanced combat capability and enemy removal efficiency

safety_signals.visual_form: Exit sign or goal marker in level space
safety_signals.meaning: Safe progression point; successful zone completion

safety_signals.visual_form: NPC merchant triggered by coin collection threshold
safety_signals.meaning: Access to secret areas with concentrated power-ups

safety_signals.visual_form: Liberated bird-in-cage item that follows player
safety_signals.meaning: Automatic ally support until damage taken

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Various demon enemy sprites with distinct behaviors

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Playable character identity; sister relationship to Jazz
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Unique character sprite and dash mechanic visual distinction

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Standard platforming levels with coherent themed environments
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Normal enemy patterns; standard obstacle placement

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Level environments across different historical/fantastical periods
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Boss encounters with Devan Shell; escalating difficulty progression

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Demonic aesthetic; infernal color palette (reds, blacks, fire); demon sprite variants
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Demon enemies spawn; Devan Shell assumes demon form; boss arena redesign

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Character sprite visual effect overlay; color shift or glow
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemies take damage on contact; temporary removal of collision damage

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Environmental teleportation; transition to hidden level space
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Concentrated power-up placement; no enemies; treasure/reward focus

environmental_storytelling.example: Wedding ring serves as both narrative MacGuffin and visual story anchor; players understand relationship between Jazz and Eva through item iconography
Devan Shell's visual mutation from human to demon form communicates story escalation and increasing threat
Time-travel narrative expressed through distinct visual level aesthetics across different temporal periods
Jazz (higher jump), Spaz (double jump), Lori (dash) communicate character identity through unique platforming visual language
Scattered coins, food, diamonds, and ammo types create sense of populated, resource-rich world; merchant economy implies civilization
Environmental obstacles and enemy sprites positioned to communicate safe vs. dangerous pathways through visual contrast

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Predictable movement patterns; standard aggression on player contact
Time machine operation; attack pattern design; arena-specific moveset
Enhanced attack speed; new ability set; visual aggression increase
Automatic enemy-targeting fire; follows player; ceases on player damage
Invulnerability; contact damage to enemies; temporary behavior modification
Increased spawn rate; potentially enhanced aggression; thematic behavior distinct from standard enemies

notes: Jazz Jackrabbit 2 communicates world state primarily through visual-level design (environment theming for time periods), enemy/boss sprite variants, and power-up iconography. The game uses minimal narrative text but relies on character selection mechanics, objective clarity (exit signs, ring MacGuffin), and visual escalation (human→demon transformation) to convey danger and story progression. Faction identity is weak in traditional sense; primary opposition is individual antagonist (Devan Shell) rather than organized factions. Environmental storytelling emphasizes objective-driven design and character differentiation through gameplay mechanics reflected in sprite animation. The merchant system and secret areas imply economic/spatial world complexity without explicit visualization.
